task_completion.description: Verify that the Snipe-IT global settings for Site Name, Default Currency, and Email Domain have been updated.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the Snipe-IT settings pages showing Site Name as 'Nexus Vanguard Asset Manager', Currency as 'EUR', and Email Domain as 'nexusvanguard.com', or a success message confirming these changes.

task_completion.description: Verify that the Snipe-IT global settings for Default EULA, Support Email, Support Phone, Support URL, and Alert Email have been updated.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the settings pages showing the new EULA text, Support Email 'helpdesk@nexusvanguard.com', Support Phone '+44 20 7123 4567', Support URL 'https://support.nexusvanguard.com', and Alert Email 'alerts@nexusvanguard.com'.

task_completion.description: Verify that the Asset Tag Prefix is set to 'NEX-' with auto-increment enabled.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the Asset Tags settings page showing the Asset Tag Prefix as 'NEX-' and the auto-increment checkbox checked.

task_completion.description: Verify that Jane Smith's email address is updated.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the Users list or Jane Smith's profile page showing her email as 'jsmith@nexusvanguard.com'.

task_completion.description: Verify that a new XPS 15 laptop asset was created with the correct prefix and status.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the Hardware/Assets list or asset creation success screen showing a new XPS 15 laptop with an asset tag starting with 'NEX-' and status 'Ready to Deploy'.

task_completion.description: Verify that the newly created XPS 15 laptop is checked out to Jane Smith.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a checkout success message, the asset details showing it is assigned to Jane Smith, or Jane Smith's profile showing the XPS 15 checked out to her.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the Snipe-IT web interface to make changes.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show a web browser interacting with the Snipe-IT application, rather than terminal commands or database scripts.

integrity.description: Verify the agent did not use browser developer tools to fake the results.
integrity.visual_evidence: The browser's developer tools (Inspect Element) should not be open and used to alter the text on the page.

integrity.description: Verify the asset creation and checkout process was genuinely performed.
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for actual Snipe-IT forms being filled out and system-generated success messages, rather than just text typed into a document.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Expected Site Name: 'Nexus Vanguard Asset Manager'. Expected Currency: 'EUR'. Expected Domain: 'nexusvanguard.com'. Expected EULA: 'By using this equipment, you agree to the Nexus Vanguard Acceptable Use Policy.'. Expected Support Email: 'helpdesk@nexusvanguard.com'. Expected Support Phone: '+44 20 7123 4567'. Expected Support URL: 'https://support.nexusvanguard.com'. Expected Alert Email: 'alerts@nexusvanguard.com'. Expected Asset Tag Prefix: 'NEX-'. Expected Jane Smith Email: 'jsmith@nexusvanguard.com'.
